overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist running through a historic Middle Eastern city at dawn. The character navigates narrow streets, ascends an elevated walkway overlooking a canal, and passes through a central plaza with distinctive mud-brick architecture and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with mud brick buildings and overhead banners

events.description: camel with handler passes by on the right side of the street
character begins ascending the sloped street

agents.ego_description: running through narrow streets, weaving between pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: camel being led by a handler walking along the street
pedestrian in dark robes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tan colored adobe buildings with wooden balconies and lattice windows
decorative string of dark triangular flags stretched across the street
green fabric shades extending over market stalls
tall palm trees visible between the buildings

segments.scene_description: The protagonist runs through a narrow market street lined with mud-brick buildings and green awnings. Overhead, strings of decorative banners stretch across the path. The character weaves through moderate pedestrian traffic as a camel passes by on the right, then begins ascending a sloped section of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cobblestone street ascending to elevated district

events.description: reaching the top of the slope where the view opens to an elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: running up the steep cobblestone street toward the higher elevation of the city

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking down the slope toward the camera

entered.detail: steep worn cobblestone paving on the ascending street
tall stone wall lining the left side of the street
tall slender tower visible in the distance against the dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep cobblestone street flanked by a tall stone retaining wall on the left. The street opens up to the sky as it climbs higher, with fewer pedestrians visible. At the top, the scene transitions to an elevated walkway with views of the city below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway overlooking canal and lower district

events.description: character pauses at stone parapet to look down at the canal waterway below
resumes running along the elevated path away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: pausing at the stone parapet to look over the canal and lower city, then continuing along the elevated walkway

entered.detail: wide stone pathway with low walls on the canal side
low stone wall lining the edge overlooking the water
water channel running through the lower part of the city
tall dark green cypress trees lining the canal banks

segments.scene_description: The protagonist moves along an elevated stone walkway with a parapet wall overlooking a canal lined with cypress trees. The character pauses to look down at the waterway and lower buildings before continuing along the path. The dawn light illuminates the scene from the side, casting long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central palm tree leading to narrow streets

events.description: horse with rider trots past on the right side of the street
entering open plaza area dominated by a large multi-story building with balconies

agents.ego_description: descending from the elevated walkway and running through the plaza and narrow streets, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: brown horse with rider trotting past on the right
pedestrian in green robes walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large mature palm tree in the center of the plaza area
prominent large building with multiple balconies, green awnings, and wooden scaffolding
abandoned wooden cart with a thatched roof structure
blue and gold decorative tiles on the lower walls of buildings

segments.scene_description: The character descends back to street level and runs through an open plaza featuring a large central palm tree and a prominent multi-story historic building with green balconies. After passing a horse rider, the protagonist continues through narrower streets lined with mud-brick buildings decorated with blue ceramic tiles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a crowded market street and ascends to a high vantage point before descending into a quiet historic plaza. It begins with the protagonist weaving through a narrow street lined with mud-brick buildings and decorative banners, passing a camel as the path begins to slope upward. As the character climbs a steep cobblestone street flanked by a tall stone wall, the enclosed market opens up to the sky, eventually transitioning onto an elevated stone walkway. The scene then shifts to a panoramic view overlooking a canal lined with cypress trees under the side-lighting of dawn, before the camera follows the character back down to street level. Finally, the movement flows through an open plaza featuring a large central palm tree and green balconies, ending as the protagonist runs past blue ceramic tiles in the narrower residential quarters.
